name: jedify
description: Jedify's plugins for Claude. Includes schema-context — connect Claude to your data warehouse and generate rich semantic context YAML (table/column labels, descriptions, semantic types, example questions) for Jedify or any NL-to-SQL tool.

plugins.name: schema-context
plugins.description: Generate semantic context YAML for your data warehouse schema. Connects to Snowflake, BigQuery, Redshift, or Postgres through your existing warehouse connector and produces human-readable table labels, column descriptions, semantic types, and example business questions — ready to import into Jedify or any NL-to-SQL tool.
